description: Protocol test vectors for cross-platform validation between Python and Flutter implementations

terminal_output.notes: data field must be base64-encoded bytes

terminal_input.notes: data field must be base64-encoded bytes

terminal_resize.notes: rows and cols must be integers between 1 and 1000

terminal_close.notes: reason should explain why the terminal was closed

session_create.description: Desktop initiates session with 32-byte X25519 public key
session_create.notes: desktop_public_key must be exactly 32 bytes when base64-decoded

session_created.description: Relay confirms session creation with pairing code
session_created.notes: pairing_code must be exactly 6 uppercase alphanumeric characters (A-Z, 0-9)

session_pair.description: Client pairs with session using pairing code and 32-byte X25519 public key
session_pair.notes: client_public_key must be exactly 32 bytes when base64-decoded

session_paired.description: Relay confirms pairing with desktop public key
session_paired.notes: desktop_public_key must be exactly 32 bytes when base64-decoded

session_close.notes: No additional fields beyond session_id required

encrypted_blob.notes: nonce must be exactly 24 bytes when base64-decoded; sender must be 'desktop' or 'client'

pong.notes: Should echo timestamp from ping for RTT calculation

json.message: Session abc123 expired after 1 hour of inactivity

error.description: Structured error with namespaced error code
error.notes: details field is optional; code should use namespaced constants

invalid_session_id_wrong_format.expected_error: session_id must be a valid UUID string
invalid_session_id_wrong_format.description: session_id must be valid UUID format

invalid_nonce_length_short.description: Nonce too short (base64-decodes to less than 24 bytes)

invalid_nonce_length_long.description: Nonce too long (base64-decodes to more than 24 bytes)

invalid_public_key_length_short.description: Public key too short (base64-decodes to less than 32 bytes)

invalid_public_key_length_long.description: Public key too long (base64-decodes to more than 32 bytes)

invalid_terminal_rows_negative.expected_error: Terminal dimensions must be between 1 and 1000

invalid_terminal_rows_zero.expected_error: Terminal dimensions must be between 1 and 1000
invalid_terminal_rows_zero.description: Terminal rows must be at least 1

invalid_terminal_rows_too_large.expected_error: Terminal dimensions must be between 1 and 1000

invalid_terminal_cols_negative.expected_error: Terminal dimensions must be between 1 and 1000

invalid_pairing_code_too_short.expected_error: pairing_code must be exactly 6 uppercase alphanumeric characters
invalid_pairing_code_too_short.description: Pairing code must be exactly 6 characters

invalid_pairing_code_too_long.expected_error: pairing_code must be exactly 6 uppercase alphanumeric characters
invalid_pairing_code_too_long.description: Pairing code must be exactly 6 characters

invalid_pairing_code_lowercase.expected_error: pairing_code must be exactly 6 uppercase alphanumeric characters
invalid_pairing_code_lowercase.description: Pairing code must be uppercase only

invalid_pairing_code_special_chars.expected_error: pairing_code must be exactly 6 uppercase alphanumeric characters
invalid_pairing_code_special_chars.description: Pairing code can only contain A-Z and 0-9

invalid_encrypted_blob_sender.description: Sender field must be literal 'desktop' or 'client'

invalid_base64_encoding.description: data field must be valid base64-encoded string

terminal_output_empty_data.description: Terminal output with empty data (valid, represents 0 bytes)

terminal_output_unicode.description: Terminal output with UTF-8 encoded emoji (base64 of '😀 😀 💓 😀')

terminal_output_ansi_codes.description: Terminal output with ANSI color codes (base64 of '\x1b[32mGreen Text\x1b[0m')

error_minimal.description: Error message without optional details field

error_empty_details.description: Error message with empty details object

serialization_roundtrip.description: Examples that should serialize and deserialize identically
